name: Naimur Rahman
bio: Statistics graduate and data enthusiast skilled in Python, SQL, Power BI, Excel, and data visualization. Conducted research on BDHS data and child nutrition.

projects.title: The association between breastfeeding practices and child nutrition status in Bangladesh
projects.desc: This study examines the impact of breastfeeding practices on child nutrition in Bangladesh. It analyzes exclusive breastfeeding, early initiation, and prelacteal feeding. Maternal, household, and regional factors are considered. The research highlights key determinants of malnutrition among children aged 0–23 months.

projects.title: UrbanCart Sales Analytics - SQL Based Business Insights
projects.desc: A data-driven analysis of UrbanCart’s sales and customer behavior using SQL. The project identifies top-performing products, high-revenue product pairs, stock-out risks, customer retention trends, basket sizes, and payment method patterns.

projects.title: Dynamic Sales Dashboard - Excel Based Business Insights
projects.desc: An interactive Excel dashboard built to analyze sales and transaction performance for a coffee and food business. The dashboard provides KPIs such as transactions, revenue, profit, category analysis, and year-over-year comparison.

projects.title: RFM Segmentation - SQL Based Analysis
projects.desc: This project performs RFM Segmentation (Recency, Frequency, Monetary) using SQL to classify customers into meaningful segments and support targeted marketing strategies.

projects.title: Cohort Analysis - SQL Based Business Analysis
projects.desc: This project performs Cohort Analysis to track customer retention over time. Using Python and SQL queries, it identifies loyal customers and provides insights to improve retention and revenue.

projects.title: Garments Production Analytics Dashboard - Power BI
projects.desc: An end-to-end Power BI dashboard analyzing the garments manufacturing workflow including yarn, knitting, fabric finishing, cutting, production, and shipment performance.
